metadata.description: Curated Claude Code plugins mirrored from upstream repositories

plugins.name: trailofbits--ask-questions-if-underspecified
plugins.description: Clarify ambiguous requirements by asking questions before implementing. Only when invoked explicitly.

plugins.name: trailofbits--gh-cli
plugins.description: Intercepts GitHub URL fetches and curl/wget commands, redirecting to the authenticated gh CLI.

plugins.name: trailofbits--modern-python
plugins.description: Modern Python best practices. Use when creating new Python projects, and writing Python scripts, or migrating existing projects from legacy tools.

plugins.name: trailofbits--supply-chain-risk-auditor
plugins.description: Audit supply-chain threat landscape of project dependencies for exploitation or takeover risk
